sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Find ALL nodes in the framed grid area and their exact positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("All nodes in framed grid area (rows 32-63, cols 32-63):")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    rmin, rmax = min(rows), max(rows)
    cmin, cmax = min(cols), max(cols)
    if 32 <= rmin <= 63 and 32 <= cmin <= 63:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"rows={rmin}-{rmax}, cols={cmin}-{cmax}, hash={n['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
